'''ây-r-th''' ('''kayarath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monopolise|monopolise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monopolise|monopolise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| kayarath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyarath|thiyarath]] || [[word:jiyarath|jiyarath]] || [[word:shiyarath|shiyarath]] || [[word:kiyarath|kiyarath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyarath|thuthuyarath]] || [[word:jujuyarath|jujuyarath]] || [[word:shushuyarath|shushuyarath]] || [[word:kukuyarath|kukuyarath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyarath|thuyarath]] || [[word:juyarath|juyarath]] || [[word:shuyarath|shuyarath]] || [[word:kuyarath|kuyarath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyarath|thuyarath]] || [[word:juyarath|juyarath]] || [[word:shuyarath|shuyarath]] || [[word:kuyarath|kuyarath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyarath|theyarath]] || [[word:jeyarath|jeyarath]] || [[word:sheyarath|sheyarath]] || [[word:keyarath|keyarath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyarath|thothoyarath]] || [[word:jojoyarath|jojoyarath]] || [[word:shoshoyarath|shoshoyarath]] || [[word:kokoyarath|kokoyarath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyarath|thoyarath]] || [[word:joyarath|joyarath]] || [[word:shoyarath|shoyarath]] || [[word:koyarath|koyarath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyarath|thoyarath]] || [[word:joyarath|joyarath]] || [[word:shoyarath|shoyarath]] || [[word:koyarath|koyarath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyarath|thĂŠyarath]] || [[word:jĂŠyarath|jĂŠyarath]] || [[word:shĂŠyarath|shĂŠyarath]] || [[word:kĂŠyarath|kĂŠyarath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayarath|thathayarath]] || [[word:jajayarath|jajayarath]] || [[word:shashayarath|shashayarath]] || [[word:kakayarath|kakayarath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayarath|thayarath]] || [[word:jayarath|jayarath]] || [[word:shayarath|shayarath]] || [[word:kayarath|kayarath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayarath|thayarath]] || [[word:jayarath|jayarath]] || [[word:shayarath|shayarath]] || [[word:kayarath|kayarath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayarath|shayarath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayarath|goshayarath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayarath|gokishayarath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayarathnĂŒ|shayarathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayarathnknĂŒ|goshayarathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayarathnĂŒ|gokishayarathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayarathshĂ«|shayarathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayarathnkshĂ«|goshayarathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayarathshĂ«|gokishayarathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayarathro|shayarathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayarathnkro|goshayarathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayarathro|gokishayarathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayarathmu|shayarathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayarathnkmu|goshayarathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayarathmu|gokishayarathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayarathsher|shayarathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayarathnksher|goshayarathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayarathsher|gokishayarathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayarathng|shayarathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayarathnkng|goshayarathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayarathng|gokishayarathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayarathya|shayarathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayarathnkya|goshayarathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayarathya|gokishayarathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayarathyam|shayarathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayarathnkyam|goshayarathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayarathyam|gokishayarathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayarathnĂŒshĂ«|shayarathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayarathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayarathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayarathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayarathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayarathnĂŒro|shayarathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayarathnknĂŒro|goshayarathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayarathnĂŒro|gokishayarathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayarathnĂŒmu|shayarathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayarathnknĂŒmu|goshayarathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayarathnĂŒmu|gokishayarathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayarathshĂ«nĂŒ|shayarathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayarathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayarathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayarathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayarathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayarathshĂ«ro|shayarathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayarathnkshĂ«ro|goshayarathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayarathshĂ«ro|gokishayarathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayarathshĂ«mu|shayarathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayarathnkshĂ«mu|goshayarathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayarathshĂ«mu|gokishayarathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayarathronĂŒ|shayarathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayarathnkronĂŒ|goshayarathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayarathronĂŒ|gokishayarathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayarathroshĂ«|shayarathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayarathnkroshĂ«|goshayarathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayarathroshĂ«|gokishayarathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayarathromu|shayarathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayarathnkromu|goshayarathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayarathromu|gokishayarathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayarathmunĂŒ|shayarathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayarathnkmunĂŒ|goshayarathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayarathmunĂŒ|gokishayarathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayarathmushĂ«|shayarathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayarathnkmushĂ«|goshayarathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayarathmushĂ«|gokishayarathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayarathmuro|shayarathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayarathnkmuro|goshayarathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayarathmuro|gokishayarathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|718161e}}
